mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO telemetry_value_archive ( sample_at, variable_name, numeric_value, raw_value, metric_kind_code, room_canonical, bundle_code, schema_version, ingest_batch_id, ext_json ) VALUES
(#{item.sampleAt}, #{item.variableName}, #{item.numericValue}, #{item.rawValue}, #{item.metricKindCode}, #{item.roomCanonical}, #{item.bundleCode}, #{item.schemaVersion}, #{item.ingestBatchId}, #{item.extJson})
mapper.select:
SELECT id, sample_at, variable_name, numeric_value, raw_value, metric_kind_code, room_canonical, bundle_code, schema_version, ingest_batch_id, ext_json FROM telemetry_value_archive
ORDER BY sample_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
